summary: Phase 12 - Completed frontend testing of Automated Bid Optimization UI. All core features working: overview stats cards, bar chart visualization (Recharts), recommendations panel with Optimize buttons, campaign table with tabs (All/Enabled/Below Target), enable optimization dialog with target win rate and auto-adjust toggle, run optimization, view history, disable optimization. Real backend integration confirmed.
seed_data_creation: Enabled optimization on Auto Video Campaign (target 35%, Manual mode) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bid Optimization page uses Recharts for bar chart visualization. Has 4 overview stat cards (Total Campaigns, Optimization Enabled, Below Target, On Target). Enable dialog has target win rate input and auto-adjust toggle. Run optimization requires minimum 100 bids to make adjustments. APIs: /api/bid-optimization/status, /api/bid-optimization/{id}/enable, /api/bid-optimization/{id}/disable, /api/bid-optimization/{id}/run, /api/bid-optimization/{id}/history

overview_stats_cards.optimization_enabled: PASS - Shows count of enabled optimizations
overview_stats_cards.below_target: PASS - Shows campaigns below target win rate
